footer.tagline: Modern mortgage lending — guided by people, accelerated by AI. From first hello to funded.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Loan Factory, Inc. All rights reserved.
footer.disclaimer: Loan Factory, Inc. is licensed to do business in multiple states. This is not a commitment to lend. All loans are subject to credit approval, underwriting, and property appraisal. Rates and terms are subject to change without notice.

notFound.title: This page took a wrong turn.
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have moved, or the link is out of date. Your loans and documents are still right where you left them.
